name: Beef Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the meat until lightly browned.
2. Drain excess fat. Add onion, garlic, chili powder, and salt; cook for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in tomato sauce and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. If using fresh chilies, broil under high heat about 8 minutes.
5. Split the chilies lengthwise and remove skin and seeds from inside.
6. Stuff each chili with the meat mixture and roll tightly in flour.
7. Heat a large skillet filled with enough oil to cover at least 1/4 inch deep.
8. Separate eggs; beat whites until stiff, yolks until light.
9. Gently fold beaten yolks into whipped whites.
10. Dip peppers in the batter mixture and carefully place them into hot oil. Cook until golden brown.
11. Remove from oil and serve with hot sauce on the side.
